sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement system documented for SNES fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Custom Combo System
special_mechanics.description: Primary mechanic in Alpha 2. Initiated by pressing two punch buttons and a kick, or one punch button and two kicks when Super Combo gauge is at Lv. 1 or above. Player can perform any series of basic and special moves until Timer Gauge runs out.

special_mechanics.name: Alpha Counter
special_mechanics.description: Defensive reversal mechanic. Each character has two Alpha Counters: one performed with kick button, another with punch button.

special_mechanics.name: Air-Blocking
special_mechanics.description: Feature carried over from original Street Fighter Alpha. Allows mid-air defensive options.

special_mechanics.name: Fall Breaking
special_mechanics.description: Feature carried over from original Street Fighter Alpha. Mechanic for recovering from knockdowns.

special_mechanics.name: Rival System
special_mechanics.description: Secret rival encounters during single-player mode. After meeting requirements, rival interrupts a match with dialogue exchange before combat.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. SNES port of arcade fighting game with documented gameplay systems but no precise movement physics values found in sources. Game focuses on combo systems and fighting mechanics rather than platforming movement. No sub-pixel precision movement documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Street Fighter Alpha 2 (SNES)
